english: Water cannot stay in the palm
meaning: Things that are unstable or unreliable will not last long, just like water cannot be held in an open palm.
Wanting too much can lead to trouble and loss; one should be content with what they have.

english: Good conduct is a great quality
meaning: A person's behavior and discipline define their true character more than anything else.

english: One who has comfort doesn’t understand hardship
meaning: People who live comfortably often fail to understand the struggles of others.

english: Be content with what you have
meaning: Happiness comes from contentment rather than constantly desiring more.
Advice from society or elders can guide us in making better decisions.
Your actions determine your results; good deeds bring good outcomes and vice versa.
Time keeps moving forward, so we must act without unnecessary delay.

english: Every crow thinks its chick is golden
meaning: People tend to value their own possessions or loved ones more than others do.
Consistent small efforts can lead to significant achievements over time.

english: A small spark becomes a big fire
meaning: Small problems can grow into serious issues if ignored.
Being alone is better than being influenced by negative people.

english: It is good to be cautious
meaning: Careful thinking and awareness help avoid unnecessary problems.
Errors are opportunities to learn and improve.
Always understand a situation before taking action.
Courage and confidence help overcome challenges.
Honesty prevails in the long run despite difficulties.

english: Where there is belief, there is a way
meaning: Confidence and faith help find solutions to problems.
What you do matters more than what you say.
Making mistakes is natural; learning from them is important.
